title: My Christmas in Boone, NC - December 25, 2010
description:
*I live in Florida but have a vacation house here in NC* It's Christmas day now, and since I'm up here in Boone North Carolina, the temperature is low enough and the conditions are good enough for snow. It's a bit hard to see in the video, since it's low-quality. Still, you can see what it's like up here.

Tomorrow I'm going back home to south Florida, which should be cold but certainly much warmer than here (that is, if I even make it home, snow might slow down our car drive)
